heading: 9.7.16.10.4.6.Packing format used for matrix A and B by.kind::mxf4and.kind::mxf4nvf4in Shared Memory
instruction: Packing format used for matrix A and B by.kind::mxf4and.kind::mxf4nvf4in Shared Memory
content:
The packing format for 4-bit floating point elements in shared memory is to pack two 4-bit
elements in a 8-bit container, with no padding.
